prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为2512→4583→5295→7513→9205名，呈持续后移趋势，近4年累计后移约6693名；2025年基准约9205名，较2024年下降约1692名， 降幅明显；该校在湖南省物理类招生计划2021年42人、2022年40人、2023年41人、2024年39人、2025年36人，呈逐年小幅缩减趋势；2026年计划35人，较 2025年再减1人，连续缩招使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第42名（2025年第45名），排名稳中有升，属全国顶尖财经类 院校；2023年声誉评价偏负面，主要因新闻传播学类专业投档位次大幅下滑；2026年声誉数据中无中央财经大学直接相关事件；抖音热度排名第97（一般），短 视频曝光量偏低，报考关注度未出现明显升温信号；应用经济学A（全国顶尖）、理论经济学A-，财经学科实力突出，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 中央财经大学位于北京，属跨省招生；金融/财经/经济类专业热度2024年评估为"分化观望"，较2023年小幅升温但仍存分歧；湖南省物理类考生2026年约34.7万人，较2025年约32.0万人增 加约8.4%，竞争加剧；省控线物理类本科批2025年405分（2024年422分），略有下降。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅缩减、湖南省物理类考生明显增加（+8.4%）以及财经类专业热度分化观望等因素，预计2026年 物理类最低录取位次在2025年9205名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约9202名，区间8702–9702名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 金融科技（北航计算机联培项目）
- 税收学（北理工智能、税收联培项目）
- 金融学类（金融工程、金融科技）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 金融学（含金融学、金融学北外英语专业联培）
- 工商管理类（会计学院）（会计学、财务管理、审计学）
- 投资学（含投资学、大数据双学位项目）
- 经济学类（澄明书院）（数理经济与数理金融、国际金融与公司理财、财政理论与政策）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 大数据管理与应用（许国志大数据英才班）
- 财政学类（财政学、税收学、资产评估）
- 工商管理类（商学院）（工商管理、市场营销、人力资源管理、供应链管理）
- 精算学
- 数字经济（成思危拔尖班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间8702–9702名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次优于区间下限（<8702名）可重点冲击金融科技、税收学联培等一档王牌专业；位 次接近区间上限（>9702名）建议以三档专业为主，确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 2512 → 4583 → 5295 → 7513 → 9205, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6693 positions in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 9205, a decrease of about 1692 positions compared to 2024, a significant drop; the enrollment plan for this university in Hunan Province for Physics Category was 42 in 2021, 40 in 2022, 41 in 2023, 39 in 2024, and 36 in 2025, showing a gradual reduction trend; the 2026 plan is 35, a further reduction of 1 compared to 2025, and the continuous reduction in enrollment slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 42nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (45th in 2025), with a stable and slightly rising ranking, belonging to the top financial and economic institutions in China; the reputation evaluation in 2023 was relatively negative, mainly due to a significant decline in the filing rankings of Journalism and Communication majors; in 2026 reputation data, there are no directly related events for Central University of Finance and Economics; Douyin popularity ranking is 97th (average), with low short video exposure, and no obvious signs of increased application attention; Applied Economics is rated A (top in China), Theoretical Economics is A-, with outstanding financial and economic discipline strength, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Central University of Finance and Economics is located in Beijing, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment; the popularity of Finance/Financial/Economics majors in 2024 was assessed as 'differentiated and wait-and-see', with a slight warming compared to 2023 but still divergent; the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province in 2026 is about 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% compared to about 320,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 405 points (422 points in 2024), a slight decrease.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase in Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province (+8.4%), and the differentiated and wait-and-see popularity of financial majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 9205; the predicted minimum ranking is about 9202, with a range of 8702–9702.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Financial Technology (Beihang University Computer Science Joint Training Program)
- Taxation (Beijing Institute of Technology Intelligent and Taxation Joint Training Program)
- Finance (Financial Engineering, Financial Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Finance (including Finance, Finance and Beijing Foreign Studies University English Major Joint Training)
- Business Administration (Accounting School) (Accounting, Financial Management, Auditing)
- Investment (including Investment, Big Data Dual Degree Program)
- Economics (Chengming Academy) (Mathematical Economics and Mathematical Finance, International Finance and Corporate Finance, Fiscal Theory and Policy).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Big Data Management and Application (Xu Guozhi Big Data Talent Class)
- Finance (Finance, Taxation, Asset Evaluation)
- Business Administration (Business School) (Business Administration, Marketing, Human Resource Management, Supply Chain Management)
- Actuarial Science
- Digital Economy (Cheng Siwei Top Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 8702–9702, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if the ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<8702), you can focus on applying for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Financial Technology and Taxation Joint Training; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>9702), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 716 → 709 → 897 → 1056 → 930, fluctuating within the range of 700–1056, reaching a peak of 1056 in 2024 before dropping to 930 in 2025; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 930; the enrollment plan for this university in Hunan's History Category was 14 in 2021, 16 in 2022, 18 in 2023, 25 in 2024, and 18 in 2025, showing significant fluctuations; the 2026 plan is 24, an increase of 6 (+33.3%) compared to 2025, with substantial expansion easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 42nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (45th in 2025), with a stable upward trend, belonging to the top national finance and economics institutions. In 2023, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to a significant drop in the admission rankings for Journalism and Communication majors; in 2026 reputation data, there are no directly related events for Central University of Finance and Economics; Douyin popularity ranking is 97th (average), with no clear signs of increased application attention; Applied Economics is rated A (top nationally), Theoretical Economics A-, with outstanding strength in finance and economics disciplines, highly matching the History Category enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of Finance/Accounting/Economics majors in 2024 is assessed as "differentiated and wait-and-see," with a slight warming compared to 2023 but still divided; the number of History Category examinees in Hunan Province in 2026 is approximately 187,000, an increase of about 31.2% from about 143,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 446 points (438 points in 2024), slightly rising; Central University of Finance and Economics is located in Beijing, involving cross-province enrollment. Considering the historical ranking fluctuations, the substantial expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+33.3%) roughly offsetting the significant increase in Hunan History Category examinees (+31.2%), and the differentiated and wait-and-see popularity of finance and economics majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 930; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1136, with a range of 966–1306.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Business Administration (Accounting School) (Accounting, Accounting-Law Dual Degree, Financial Management, Auditing)
- Finance and Taxation (Finance, Taxation, Asset Valuation-Data Intelligence Elite Class, Finance-Financial Theory Base Class, Taxation-Beijing Foreign Studies University English Joint Training)
- Economics (Chengming College) (Mathematical Economics and Mathematical Finance, International Finance and Corporate Finance, Fiscal Theory and Policy).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Law (including dual degrees with Accounting and Business Administration, totaling 4 majors)
- Finance
- Economics and Trade (International Economics and Trade, International Business, Trade Economics, International Economics and Trade-Applied Statistics Dual Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Public Administration (Administrative Management, Urban Management, Urban Management-Beijing University of Science and Technology Civil Engineering Joint Training)
- Journalism and Communication (Journalism-Financial News, Advertising-Brand Management)
- Chinese Language and Literature.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 966–1306, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; for rankings better than the lower limit (<966), prioritize top-tier majors such as Accounting School and Finance and Taxation; for rankings near the upper limit (>1306), focus mainly on Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
